tEn: Modality Forcing for Scalable Spatial Generation
tZh: 模态强制：可扩展的空间生成方法
sEn: Modality Forcing enables scalable joint image-depth generation by assigning separate noise levels per modality, achieving state-of-the-art depth prediction.
sZh: 模态强制通过为每种模态分配独立的噪声水平，实现了可扩展的联合图像-深度生成，达到了最先进的深度预测性能。
absEn: Text-to-image (T2I) models contain rich spatial priors. Synthesizing photorealistic, cluttered scenes requires an understanding of geometry, including perspective and relative scale. Prior works adapt T2I models to leverage this prior for depth prediction, but they require dense depth data and involve complex recipes. We propose Modality Forcing, a simple, scalable post-training recipe for joint image-depth generation using a single DiT trained on sparse depth data. Modality Forcing enables conditional and joint generation of image and depth in any permutation by assigning separate noise levels per modality. Per-modality decoders let us train on sparse, real-world depth and achieve strong, generalizable depth prediction. We further show that Modality Forcing inherits the scalability of T2I pre-training: by training a set of T2I models from scratch (370M to 3.3B parameters), we find that larger models trained on more image data produce more accurate depth. Our strongest model is competitive with state-of-the-art monocular depth estimators and reduces AbsRel by 57% relative to existing joint image-depth generative models. These results provide strong evidence that image generation is a scalable pre-training objective for spatial perception. https://modality-forcing.github.io/
absZh: 文本到图像（T2I）模型包含丰富的空间先验。合成逼真、杂乱的场景需要理解几何，包括透视和相对尺度。先前的工作将 T2I 模型适配以利用这种先验进行深度预测，但它们需要密集的深度数据并涉及复杂的方案。我们提出模态强制，一种简单、可扩展的后训练方案，使用在稀疏深度数据上训练的单个 DiT 进行联合图像-深度生成。模态强制通过为每种模态分配独立的噪声水平，支持图像和深度的条件生成和联合生成，且排列顺序任意。每种模态的解码器使我们能够在稀疏的真实世界深度上训练，并实现强大的、可泛化的深度预测。我们进一步表明，模态强制继承了 T2I 预训练的可扩展性：通过从头开始训练一组 T2I 模型（370M 到 3.3B 参数），我们发现，在更多图像数据上训练的更大模型能产生更准确的深度。我们最强的模型与最先进的单目深度估计器竞争，并将现有联合图像-深度生成模型的 AbsRel 降低了 57%。这些结果提供了强有力的证据，表明图像生成是空间感知的可扩展预训练目标。https://modality-forcing.github.io/

contrib.en: Proposes Modality Forcing, a simple post-training recipe for joint image-depth generation using a single DiT trained on sparse depth data.
contrib.zh: 提出 Modality Forcing，一种简单的后训练方法，使用单个 DiT 在稀疏深度数据上训练，实现图像-深度联合生成。

contrib.en: Enables conditional and joint generation of image and depth in any permutation by assigning separate noise levels per modality.
contrib.zh: 通过为每种模态分配独立的噪声水平，支持图像和深度任意排列的条件生成和联合生成。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that depth prediction scales with T2I model size and training data size through controlled scaling experiments from 370M to 3.3B parameters.
contrib.zh: 通过从 3.7 亿到 33 亿参数的受控缩放实验，证明深度预测随 T2I 模型大小和训练数据规模扩展。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation, reducing AbsRel by 57% relative to existing joint image-depth generative models.
contrib.zh: 实现最先进的单目深度估计，与现有联合图像-深度生成模型相比，AbsRel 降低 57%。

contrib.en: Introduces self-distillation loss to preserve T2I prior during post-training, preventing catastrophic forgetting.
contrib.zh: 引入自蒸馏损失，在后训练期间保留 T2I 先验，防止灾难性遗忘。

contrib.en: Provides evidence that image generation is a scalable pre-training objective for spatial perception.
contrib.zh: 提供证据表明图像生成是空间感知的可扩展预训练目标。

limits.en: Scaling study limited to at most 3.3B parameters and does not derive a full scaling law.
limits.zh: 缩放研究最多限于 33 亿参数，未推导完整的缩放定律。

limits.en: Experiments use relatively few depth samples, several orders of magnitude fewer than T2I pretraining data.
limits.zh: 实验使用的深度样本相对较少，比 T2I 预训练数据少几个数量级。

limits.en: Architectural adjustments may further reduce artifacts or enable prediction of metric depth.
limits.zh: 架构调整可能进一步减少伪影或实现公制深度预测。

limits.en: Depth tokenization in pixel space may limit extension to other spatial modalities like meshes or point clouds.
limits.zh: 像素空间的深度标记化可能限制扩展到其他空间模态，如网格或点云。

limits.en: Performance on ScanNet is confounded by training split inclusion in data mixture.
limits.zh: 在 ScanNet 上的性能因数据混合中包含训练集分割而受到干扰。

items.en: Text-to-image (T2I) models contain rich spatial priors. Synthesizing photorealistic, cluttered scenes requires an understanding of geometry, including perspective and relative scale. Prior works adapt T2I models to leverage this prior for depth prediction, but they require dense depth data and involve complex recipes. We propose Modality Forcing, a simple, scalable post-training recipe for joint image-depth generation using a single DiT trained on sparse depth data. Modality Forcing enables conditional and joint generation of image and depth in any permutation by assigning separate noise levels per modality. Per-modality decoders let us train on sparse, real-world depth and achieve strong, generalizable depth prediction. We further show that Modality Forcing inherits the scalability of T2I pre-training: by training a set of T2I models from scratch (370M to 3.3B parameters), we find that larger models trained on more image data produce more accurate depth. Our strongest model is competitive with state-of-the-art monocular depth estimators and reduces AbsRel by 57% relative to existing joint image-depth generative models. These results provide strong evidence that image generation is a scalable pre-training objective for spatial perception.
items.zh: 文本到图像（T2I）模型包含丰富的空间先验。合成逼真、杂乱的场景需要理解几何，包括透视和相对尺度。先前的工作利用 T2I 模型利用这一先验进行深度预测，但它们需要密集的深度数据并涉及复杂的方案。我们提出模态强制（Modality Forcing），一种简单、可扩展的后训练方案，使用在稀疏深度数据上训练的单个 DiT 进行联合图像-深度生成。模态强制通过为每个模态分配单独的噪声水平，实现了图像和深度以任意排列的条件生成和联合生成。每个模态的解码器使我们能够在稀疏的真实世界深度上进行训练，并实现强大的、可泛化的深度预测。我们进一步表明，模态强制继承了 T2I 预训练的可扩展性：通过从头训练一组 T2I 模型（370M 到 3.3B 参数），我们发现更大的模型在更多图像数据上训练会产生更准确的深度。我们最强的模型与最先进的单目深度估计器竞争，并将现有联合图像-深度生成模型的 AbsRel 降低了 57%。这些结果提供了强有力的证据，表明图像生成是空间感知的可扩展预训练目标。

items.capZh: (a) 联合生成：文本 ⇒ 图像 + 深度
(b) 条件生成：图像 ⇌ 深度

items.capEn: Figure 2: Modality Forcing generates rich RGB-Depth from text prompts. Unprojecting the points to 3D, Modality Forcing generates faithful and sharp geometry. The same checkpoint enables monocular depth estimation, and depth-to-image generation competitive with the best specialist models.
items.capZh: 图 2：模态强制从文本提示生成丰富的 RGB-D。将点反投影到 3D，模态强制生成忠实且锐利的几何形状。相同的检查点支持单目深度估计和深度到图像生成，与最好的专家模型竞争。

items.en: Over the past several years, simple architectures and formulations fed with plentiful data have outperformed complex human-designed pipelines in many tasks. Examples include DUSt3R [40] for 3D reconstruction, SAM [16] for segmentation, and SAM-3D [33] for mesh generation. A central lesson is that general methods capable of absorbing more data are more effective than complex heuristics—often called the bitter lesson [32].
items.zh: 在过去的几年中，简单的架构和公式配合丰富的数据在许多任务中超越了复杂的人工设计流程。例子包括用于 3D 重建的 DUSt3R [40]、用于分割的 SAM [16]和用于网格生成的 SAM-3D [33]。一个核心教训是，能够吸收更多数据的通用方法比复杂的启发式方法更有效——通常被称为苦涩的教训 [32]。

items.en: Models trained on task-specific data have led to considerable advances; however, 3D data is scarce which makes it difficult to scale to the quantities required for large models. One approach to ease this is to combine multiple synergetic tasks in a unified multi-task formulation. Language modeling is the clearest example, where a single generalist model trained on next-token prediction [5] exceeds specialist systems across translation, question answering, and coding.
items.zh: 在任务特定数据上训练的模型带来了显著进步；然而，3D 数据稀缺，这使得难以扩展到大型模型所需的数量。缓解这一问题的一种方法是将多个协同任务结合到统一的多任务公式中。语言建模是最清晰的例子，其中在下一个词预测 [5] 上训练的单一通用模型在翻译、问答和编码方面超越了专家系统。

items.en: Text-to-image (T2I) models contain similarly rich representations, but adapting them to new spatial tasks is difficult. First, they denoise latent tokens in an image VAE which is not designed for arbitrary spatial modalities. Depth as images limits training to dense (usually synthetic) samples and precludes encoding other spatial modalities such as meshes or point clouds. Second, post-training T2I models for spatial tasks may destroy its pretrained backbone and limit the pre-training benefit. Post-training generative models to produce spatial modalities requires a simple and scalable recipe.
items.zh: 文本到图像（T2I）模型包含类似丰富的表示，但将它们适应新的空间任务很困难。首先，它们在图像 VAE 中对潜在令牌进行去噪，该 VAE 并非为任意空间模态设计。将深度作为图像限制了训练到密集（通常是合成的）样本，并排除了编码其他空间模态（如网格或点云）的可能性。其次，对 T2I 模型进行后训练以用于空间任务可能会破坏其预训练骨干并限制预训练收益。对生成模型进行后训练以产生空间模态需要一个简单且可扩展的方案。

items.en: We introduce Modality Forcing, a post-training recipe that enables a pre-trained T2I model to predict depth. Modality Forcing combines latent RGB tokens and pixel-space depth tokens into a single DiT to model the joint image-depth distribution. Pixel-space depth diffusion enables learning from sparse real-world depth annotations and achieves state-of-the-art results. Once trained, Modality Forcing allows setting RGB or depth as a target or conditioning, enabling joint generation, or conditional image-to-depth (I2D) or depth-to-image (D2I) generation.
items.zh: 我们引入模态强制（Modality Forcing），一种后训练方案，使预训练的 T2I 模型能够预测深度。模态强制将潜在 RGB 令牌和像素空间深度令牌组合到单个 DiT 中，以建模联合图像-深度分布。像素空间深度扩散使得能够从稀疏的真实世界深度标注中学习，并实现最先进的结果。一旦训练完成，模态强制允许将 RGB 或深度设置为目标或条件，从而实现联合生成，或条件图像到深度（I2D）或深度到图像（D2I）生成。

items.en: Prior work has also modeled the joint RGB-depth distribution, but relied on learned adapters and was limited to dense depth data [46, 6]. We show that post-training a single DiT on the joint distribution unlocks training on real-world data and improves depth predictions by 57% on average. Concurrent work explored native multimodal pre-training [43] and instruction fine-tuning [12], representing depth as images. These models show encouraging results across visual tasks but share the same challenges with data, and leave it unclear whether depth quality scales with T2I capability.
items.zh: 先前的工作也建模了联合 RGB-深度分布，但依赖于学习的适配器，并限于密集深度数据 [46, 6]。我们表明，在联合分布上对单个 DiT 进行后训练可以解锁在真实世界数据上的训练，并将深度预测平均提高 57%。并行工作探索了原生多模态预训练 [43] 和指令微调 [12]，将深度表示为图像。这些模型在视觉任务上显示出令人鼓舞的结果，但共享相同的数据挑战，并且不清楚深度质量是否随 T2I 能力扩展。

items.en: We contribute a controlled scaling study to investigate the scalability of Modality Forcing with T2I model capability. We train a family of DiT’s from scratch, spanning from 370M to 3.3B parameters, and apply the same Modality Forcing recipe to each. We find that increasingly capable T2I models, larger models trained on more images, produce more accurate depth predictions. This suggests T2I is a scalable pre-training objective for spatial generation.
items.zh: 我们贡献了一项受控的扩展研究，以调查模态强制随 T2I 模型能力的可扩展性。我们从头训练一系列 DiT，参数从 370M 到 3.3B，并对每个应用相同的模态强制方案。我们发现，越来越强大的 T2I 模型，即在更多图像上训练的更大模型，产生更准确的深度预测。这表明 T2I 是空间生成的可扩展预训练目标。

items.en: Modality Forcing, a simple post-training recipe that unifies three spatial tasks—monocular depth estimation (I2D), depth-to-image (D2I), and joint image-depth generation with one set of weights.
items.zh: 模态强制，一种简单的后训练方案，统一了三个空间任务——单目深度估计（I2D）、深度到图像（D2I）和联合图像-深度生成，使用一组权重。

items.en: A controlled scaling study from 370M to 3.3B parameters and from zero to 1.92B images, showing that depth predictions scale with T2I model and training size.
items.zh: 一项受控的扩展研究，参数从 370M 到 3.3B，图像从 0 到 19.2 亿，表明深度预测随 T2I 模型和训练规模扩展。

items.en: State-of-the-art results: applied to FLUX.2-klein-9B, Modality Forcing competes with the best depth estimators and outperforms joint image-depth baselines by a margin of 57%.
items.zh: 最先进的结果：应用于 FLUX.2-klein-9B，模态强制与最佳深度估计器竞争，并以 57%的幅度优于联合图像-深度基线。

items.en: Text-to-image (T2I) models have advanced rapidly over the past few years [27, 10, 18, 34]. The Stable Diffusion family of models began with latent diffusion models [27], which perform denoising in the latent space of a pretrained VAE rather than in pixel space; this became the dominant template for efficient image synthesis. A major architectural shift came with Stable Diffusion 3 [10], which replaced the U-Net with a Diffusion Transformer (DiT) [25] trained under a rectified-flow objective. The current state of the art for open-source models is largely set by FLUX [18] and Z-Image [34] — both flow transformers operating in the latent space of an image VAE and trained on large volumes of curated data. Whether this growing T2I capability reflects a correspondingly stronger underlying spatial prior remains untested; Modality Forcing answers this by post-training a controlled family of T2I checkpoints into joint image-depth generators under one recipe.
items.zh: 文本到图像（T2I）模型在过去几年中迅速发展 [27, 10, 18, 34]。Stable Diffusion 模型系列始于潜在扩散模型 [27]，它在预训练 VAE 的潜在空间中进行去噪，而不是在像素空间；这成为高效图像合成的主导模板。一个主要的架构转变来自 Stable Diffusion 3 [10]，它将 U-Net 替换为在整流流目标下训练的扩散 Transformer（DiT）[25]。当前开源模型的最先进水平主要由 FLUX [18]和 Z-Image [34]设定——两者都是在图像 VAE 的潜在空间中运行的流 Transformer，并在大量精选数据上训练。这种不断增长的 T2I 能力是否反映了相应更强的底层空间先验仍未测试；模态强制通过在一个方案下将受控的 T2I 检查点家族后训练为联合图像-深度生成器来回答这个问题。

items.en: Monocular depth estimation has recently been transformed by foundation models trained on large corpora [44, 45, 38, 39]. Depth Anything V2 [45] scales by distilling a large teacher trained on synthetic data through pseudo-labeled real images, yielding strong zero-shot depth. Other works repurpose T2I models as depth priors: Marigold [15] fine-tunes Stable Diffusion on synthetic RGB-D pairs. The DiT architecture itself has also been adapted for depth: Pixel-Perfect Depth [42] shows that diffusing depth in pixel space avoids edge artifacts. Most recently, MoGe [38] reframes the problem as direct prediction of an affine-invariant 3D point map from which depth and intrinsics can be derived, and MoGe-2 [39] extends this to metric scale. Together, these lines of work establish that foundation-style learning on large 3D datasets yields high-quality depth and that T2I models carry exploitable spatial priors. Despite the rapid progress of T2I models, the extent to which their spatial priors transfer to depth has not been systematically studied.
items.zh: 单目深度估计最近被在大语料库上训练的基础模型所改变 [44, 45, 38, 39]。Depth Anything V2 [45] 通过从合成数据训练的大型教师模型通过伪标记的真实图像进行蒸馏来扩展，产生强大的零样本深度。其他工作将 T2I 模型重新用作深度先验：Marigold [15] 在合成 RGB-D 对上微调 Stable Diffusion。DiT 架构本身也被适应于深度：Pixel-Perfect Depth [42] 表明在像素空间中扩散深度避免了边缘伪影。最近，MoGe [38] 将问题重新定义为直接预测仿射不变 3D 点图，从中可以导出深度和内参，MoGe-2 [39] 将其扩展到度量尺度。这些工作共同确立了在大规模 3D 数据集上的基础风格学习产生高质量深度，并且 T2I 模型携带可开发的深度先验。尽管 T2I 模型取得了快速进展，但其深度先验转移到深度的程度尚未被系统研究。

items.en: A growing body of work tackles jointly generating images and depth, motivated by the observation that a single joint distribution over RGB and depth unifies conditional and joint generation. LDM3D [30] retrains a Stable Diffusion VAE and U-Net on six-channel RGB-D inputs. JointNet [46] duplicates the pretrained U-Net into a parallel depth branch tightly coupled to a frozen RGB branch, supporting bidirectional prediction via channel-wise inpainting. UniCon [21] generalizes this with LoRA and disentangled per-branch noise schedules, recovering depth-conditioned generation, depth estimation, and joint sampling in a single model. JointDiT [6] ports the paradigm to diffusion transformers atop FLUX.1, introducing unbalanced per-modality timestep sampling. Orchid [17] instead trains a joint VAE over color, depth, and normals, paired with a single latent diffusion model. All of these methods rely on dense RGB-D supervision, typically from synthetic data or curated captured datasets. In contrast, Modality Forcing is a post-training recipe that scales with the base T2I model and removes the requirement for dense supervision.
items.zh: 越来越多的工作致力于联合生成图像和深度，其动机是观察到 RGB 和深度上的单一联合分布统一了条件生成和联合生成。LDM3D [30] 在六通道 RGB-D 输入上重新训练 Stable Diffusion VAE 和 U-Net。JointNet [46] 将预训练的 U-Net 复制到一个与冻结的 RGB 分支紧密耦合的并行深度分支中，通过通道级修补支持双向预测。UniCon [21] 使用 LoRA 和解耦的每分支噪声调度对此进行泛化，在单个模型中恢复深度条件生成、深度估计和联合采样。JointDiT [6] 将范式移植到基于 FLUX.1 的扩散 Transformer 上，引入不平衡的每模态时间步采样。Orchid [17] 则训练了一个联合 VAE，覆盖颜色、深度和法线，并配以单个潜在扩散模型。所有这些方法都依赖于密集的 RGB-D 监督，通常来自合成数据或精心策划的捕获数据集。相比之下，模态强制是一种后训练方案，随基础 T2I 模型扩展，并消除了密集监督的要求。

items.en: Modality Forcing post-trains a pretrained text-to-image DiT to model the joint distribution over RGB and depth. The core idea is to give each modality its own noise level, so that a single set of weights supports joint generation and either conditional direction. Tokenizing depth in pixel space further lets the model learn from sparse, real-world depth supervision.
items.zh: 模态强制对预训练的文本到图像 DiT 进行后训练，以建模 RGB 和深度上的联合分布。核心思想是为每个模态分配其自己的噪声水平，以便一组权重支持联合生成和任一条件方向。在像素空间中对深度进行令牌化进一步使模型能够从稀疏的真实世界深度监督中学习。

items.en: We unify three generation tasks under a single model: joint image and depth generation, depth to image, and image to depth. Let 𝐜\mathbf{c} denote a text prompt, 𝐱∈ℝH×W×3\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb{R}^{H\times W\times 3} an RGB image, and 𝐝∈ℝH×W\mathbf{d}\in\mathbb{R}^{H\times W} a depth map. We learn a joint generator
items.zh: 我们将三个生成任务统一到单个模型下：联合图像和深度生成、深度到图像、以及图像到深度。令 c 表示文本提示，x ∈ ℝ^{H×W×3} 为 RGB 图像，d ∈ ℝ^{H×W} 为深度图。我们学习一个联合生成器

items.en: from a set of (𝐜,𝐱,𝐝)(\mathbf{c},\mathbf{x},\mathbf{d}) triples. A single model pθp_{\theta} then supports three tasks during inference:
items.zh: 从一组 (𝐜,𝐱,𝐝) 三元组中。单个模型 pθ 在推理时支持三个任务：

items.en: Diffusion models are an expressive class of generative models for high-quality generation. We discuss flow-matching with vv-prediction [23] and xx-prediction [20]. Let 𝐱0∼q⁡(𝐱)\mathbf{x}_{0}\sim q(\mathbf{x}) denote a clean data distribution and ϵ∼𝒩⁡(𝟎,𝐈)\bm{\epsilon}\sim\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0},\mathbf{I}) Gaussian noise. We interpolate linearly between the two with a scalar t∈[0,1]t\in[0,1] to create training samples,
items.zh: 扩散模型是一类用于高质量生成的表现力丰富的生成模型。我们讨论使用 v-预测 [23] 和 x-预测 [20] 的流匹配。设 𝐱0∼q(𝐱) 表示干净数据分布，ϵ∼𝒩(𝟎,𝐈) 表示高斯噪声。我们使用标量 t∈[0,1] 在两者之间线性插值以创建训练样本，

items.en: so that 𝐱0\mathbf{x}_{0} is clean and 𝐱1\mathbf{x}_{1} is pure noise. The constant velocity along this path is 𝐯=𝐱0−ϵ\mathbf{v}=\mathbf{x}_{0}-\bm{\epsilon}. With v-prediction we parameterize the output as the velocity and regress a network gθ​(𝐱t,t)g_{\theta}(\mathbf{x}_{t},t) directly:
items.zh: 使得 𝐱0 是干净的，𝐱1 是纯噪声。沿此路径的恒定速度为 𝐯=𝐱0−ϵ。使用 v-预测，我们将输出参数化为速度，并直接回归网络 gθ(𝐱t,t)：

items.en: Recent work has shown that vv-prediction can struggle in high-dimensional spaces [20], instead suggesting to parameterize the output as the clean sample, 𝐱^0=gθ​(𝐱t,t)\hat{\mathbf{x}}_{0}=g_{\theta}(\mathbf{x}_{t},t). The implied velocity 𝐯^=(𝐱^0−𝐱t)/t\hat{\mathbf{v}}=(\hat{\mathbf{x}}_{0}-\mathbf{x}_{t})/t is regressed to 𝐯\mathbf{v}:
items.zh: 最近的研究表明，v-预测在高维空间中可能存在问题 [20]，因此建议将输出参数化为干净样本 𝐱̂ 0=gθ(𝐱t,t)。隐含速度 𝐯̂ =(𝐱̂ 0−𝐱t)/t 回归到 𝐯：

items.en: This is well-conditioned when the data lies on a low-dimensional manifold (such as natural images or depth maps). Both methods sample the learned vector field from t=1t=1 to t=0t=0 with an ODE solver.
items.zh: 当数据位于低维流形（如自然图像或深度图）上时，这是良态的。两种方法都使用 ODE 求解器从 t=1 到 t=0 对学习到的向量场进行采样。

items.en: We introduce Modality Forcing, a diffusion algorithm with per-modality noise levels. Assigning separate noise levels allows conditional and joint generation in any permutation: an image with no noise conditions, while a full noise image is a generation target. Several methods use this idea, but differ in the axis along which the noise varies. Teacher Forcing [41] runs along sequence position, holding past tokens clean while denoising the next. Diffusion Forcing [7] varies noise level per token. Latent Forcing [1] denoises DINO [24] latents ahead of raw pixels. Modality Forcing extends this idea to the axis of modality: RGB and depth carry their own noise levels within a diffusion process, so that fixing a modality at t=0t=0 makes it conditioning. The schedule alone selects joint, image-to-depth, or depth-to-image generation.
items.zh: 我们引入了模态强制（Modality Forcing），一种具有每模态噪声水平的扩散算法。分配单独的噪声水平允许以任意排列进行条件生成和联合生成：无噪声的图像作为条件，而全噪声图像作为生成目标。几种方法使用了这一思想，但在噪声变化的轴上有所不同。教师强制（Teacher Forcing）[41] 沿序列位置运行，在去噪下一个词元时保持过去的词元干净。扩散强制（Diffusion Forcing）[7] 改变每个词元的噪声水平。潜在强制（Latent Forcing）[1] 在原始像素之前对 DINO [24] 潜在表示进行去噪。模态强制将此思想扩展到模态轴：RGB 和深度在扩散过程中携带各自的噪声水平，因此将模态固定在 t=0 使其成为条件。仅通过调度选择联合、图像到深度或深度到图像的生成。

items.en: We post-train existing T2I models to support all sampling schemes. During training, we sample per-modality noise levels in three different ways to support our three generation tasks. Joint RGB-D generation samples trgb,tdepth∈[0,1]t_{\text{rgb}},t_{\text{depth}}\in[0,1]; I2D fixes trgb=0t_{\text{rgb}}=0 and samples tdepth∈[0,1]t_{\text{depth}}\in[0,1]; and D2I samples trgb∈[0,1]t_{\text{rgb}}\in[0,1] and fixes tdepth=0t_{\text{depth}}=0.
items.zh: 我们对现有 T2I 模型进行后训练以支持所有采样方案。在训练期间，我们以三种不同方式采样每模态噪声水平以支持我们的三个生成任务。联合 RGB-D 生成采样 trgb,tdepth∈[0,1]；I2D 固定 trgb=0 并采样 tdepth∈[0,1]；D2I 采样 trgb∈[0,1] 并固定 tdepth=0。

items.en: Real-world videos typically only contain sparse depth annotation, since depth is estimated, e.g., using multi-view stereo (MVS) pipelines. To allow for post-training on these sparse annotations, we denoise depth directly in pixel space rather than the latent VAE space.
items.zh: 真实世界视频通常仅包含稀疏深度标注，因为深度是估计的，例如使用多视图立体（MVS）流程。为了允许在这些稀疏标注上进行后训练，我们直接在像素空间中对深度进行去噪，而不是在潜在 VAE 空间中。

items.en: This is in contrast to prior work [6, 21, 15] which tokenizes depth through a pre-existing or new image VAE, with no obvious mechanism to accommodate partial depth supervision. We fill missing pixels with isotropic Gaussian noise to signal to the model that depth is not available at those locations, equivalent to how a fully missing depth map is encoded.
items.zh: 这与先前的工作 [6, 21, 15] 形成对比，这些工作通过预先存在的或新的图像 VAE 对深度进行词元化，但没有明显的机制来适应部分深度监督。我们用各向同性高斯噪声填充缺失像素，以向模型指示这些位置没有深度可用，这相当于完全缺失深度图的编码方式。

items.en: Because each modality is denoised at its own noise level, every token must be modulated by its own timestep. We give RGB and depth separate timestep embedders: the RGB stream reuses the pretrained embedder, while depth receives a freshly initialized one. Since joint and conditional generation couple the two noise levels, we additionally let each stream’s modulation observe the other modality’s timestep through a lightweight cross-stream mixing module—one small embedder per direction. We initialize both to zero, so the embedding begins as an exact identity with no cross-communication and learns the coupling over training.
items.zh: 由于每个模态以其自身的噪声水平进行去噪，每个词元必须由其自身的时间步调制。我们为 RGB 和深度提供单独的时间步嵌入器：RGB 流重用预训练的嵌入器，而深度接收一个新初始化的嵌入器。由于联合和条件生成耦合了两个噪声水平，我们还让每个流的调制通过一个轻量级的跨流混合模块（每个方向一个小嵌入器）观察另一模态的时间步。我们将两者初始化为零，因此嵌入开始时是精确的恒等映射，没有交叉通信，并在训练过程中学习耦合。

items.en: The DiT blocks are followed by a depth detokenizer with nn layers of self-attention, followed by a final linear layer that maps the depth tokens back to pixel space. The extra depth blocks help create depth-specific capacity without disrupting the RGB stream. We normalize depth supervision by scaling it to have unit mean, followed by spatial contraction [2] to ensure d∈[0,2]d\in[0,2].
items.zh: DiT 块之后是一个深度解词元器，包含 n 层自注意力，随后是一个最终的线性层，将深度词元映射回像素空间。额外的深度块有助于创建深度特定的容量，而不会干扰 RGB 流。我们通过将深度监督缩放到单位均值，然后进行空间收缩 [2] 以确保 d∈[0,2] 来归一化深度监督。

items.en: We warm-start the depth pathway rather than training it from scratch. We initialize the depth stream by cloning the pretrained image-stream weights; the remaining depth-specific modules—the pixel-space tokenizer, the depth timestep embedder, the detokenizer, and the cross-stream mixers—are initialized from scratch.
items.zh: 我们热启动深度路径，而不是从头训练。我们通过克隆预训练的图像流权重来初始化深度流；其余深度特定模块——像素空间词元化器、深度时间步嵌入器、解词元器和跨流混合器——从头初始化。

items.en: T2I models are trained on billions of images; post-training them on millions of less diverse images may erode the rich prior. To preserve it, we introduce a self-distillation loss that penalizes the student for drifting from the original T2I checkpoint (similar in spirit to ‘Learning without Forgetting’ [22]). At train time, we pass the current noisy RGB through the frozen T2I model and record its predicted velocity 𝐯t2i\mathbf{v}_{\text{t2i}}, then penalize the deviation of the student’s RGB velocity 𝐯\mathbf{v}:
items.zh: T2I 模型在数十亿张图像上训练；在数百万张多样性较差的图像上进行后训练可能会侵蚀丰富的先验。为了保留它，我们引入了一种自蒸馏损失，惩罚学生偏离原始 T2I 检查点（类似于“无遗忘学习”[22] 的精神）。在训练时，我们将当前带噪的 RGB 通过冻结的 T2I 模型，并记录其预测的速度 𝐯t2i，然后惩罚学生 RGB 速度 𝐯 的偏差：

items.en: where ‖𝐯t2i−𝐯‖22||\mathbf{v}_{\text{t2i}}-\mathbf{v}||_{2}^{2} is the L2 loss between the predicted velocity and the T2I-predicted velocity. We set λhi>λlo\lambda_{\text{hi}}>\lambda_{\text{lo}} so the penalty is strongest at tdepth=1t_{\text{depth}}=1: when depth is fully noised it carries no information. As depth is denoised toward tdepth=0t_{\text{depth}}=0, it supplies context the T2I model never sees, so we relax the penalty rather than force agreement with a now-uninformed teacher.
items.zh: 其中 ‖𝐯t2i−𝐯‖22 是预测速度与 T2I 预测速度之间的 L2 损失。我们设置 λhi>λlo，使得惩罚在 tdepth=1 时最强：当深度完全噪声化时，它不携带任何信息。随着深度向 tdepth=0 去噪，它提供了 T2I 模型从未见过的上下文，因此我们放松惩罚，而不是强制与现在无信息的教师达成一致。

items.en: We evaluate Modality Forcing across joint and conditional RGB-Depth tasks. First, we train a suite of T2I models from scratch to study how depth generation scales with T2I model and training dataset size. Next, we apply Modality Forcing to FLUX.2-klein-9B, and benchmark it against the best specialist models. Our experiments show that depth quality scales reliably with T2I model size and data, and that Modality Forcing is competitive with the best depth models.
items.zh: 我们在联合和条件 RGB-Depth 任务上评估模态强制。首先，我们从头训练一套 T2I 模型，以研究深度生成如何随 T2I 模型和训练数据集大小缩放。接下来，我们将模态强制应用于 FLUX.2-klein-9B，并针对最佳专门模型进行基准测试。我们的实验表明，深度质量可靠地随 T2I 模型大小和数据缩放，并且模态强制与最佳深度模型具有竞争力。

items.en: We conduct a controlled scaling experiment to answer: does depth performance scale with T2I capability? We train three T2I models on a large and diverse set of web images at 256×\times256 resolution and post-train with Modality Forcing. We evaluate depth performance across model and training dataset sizes. There should be improvements across both axes if our hypothesis is true.
items.zh: 我们进行了一项受控的缩放实验，以回答：深度性能是否随 T2I 能力缩放？我们在 256×256 分辨率下，在一个大型且多样化的网络图像集上训练三个 T2I 模型，并使用模态强制进行后训练。我们评估了跨模型和训练数据集大小的深度性能。如果我们的假设成立，两个轴上都应有改进。

items.en: Each T2I model is a DiT trained with a flow-matching objective. For each training pair (𝐱,𝐜)(\mathbf{x},\mathbf{c}), we encode the image into a clean latent 𝐳0\mathbf{z}_{0} with the frozen FLUX.2 VAE [18]. We sample a timestep t∈[0,1]t\in[0,1] and add noise to the latent along the linear interpolant 𝐳t=(1−t)​𝐳0+t​ϵ\mathbf{z}_{t}=(1-t)\,\mathbf{z}_{0}+t\,\bm{\epsilon} with ϵ∼𝒩⁡(𝟎,𝐈)\bm{\epsilon}\sim\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0},\mathbf{I}). The network output gθ​(𝐳t,t,𝐜)g_{\theta}(\mathbf{z}_{t},t,\mathbf{c}) is parameterized as a clean-latent prediction 𝐳^0\hat{\mathbf{z}}_{0}, and we regress the implied velocity to the true velocity 𝐯=𝐳0−ϵ\mathbf{v}=\mathbf{z}_{0}-\epsilon:
items.zh: 每个 T2I 模型都是一个使用流匹配目标训练的 DiT。对于每个训练对 (𝐱,𝐜)，我们使用冻结的 FLUX.2 VAE [18] 将图像编码为干净潜在表示 𝐳0。我们采样时间步 t∈[0,1]，并沿线性插值 𝐳t=(1−t)𝐳0+tϵ 向潜在表示添加噪声，其中 ϵ∼𝒩(𝟎,𝐈)。网络输出 gθ(𝐳t,t,𝐜) 被参数化为干净潜在预测 𝐳̂ 0，我们将隐含速度回归到真实速度 𝐯=𝐳0−ϵ：

items.en: The resulting checkpoints are the starting points for Modality Forcing post-training.
items.zh: 得到的检查点是模态强制后训练的起点。

items.en: We vary model size from 370M to 3.3B (Table 2), and T2I pre-training data size from zero to 1.92B samples. For depth, we use ≈\approx17M training frames, a combination of real and synthetic images (Table 1), and evaluate depth across NYUv2 [29], DIODE [35], ETH3D [28] and ScanNet [9].
items.zh: 我们将模型大小从 370M 变化到 3.3B（表 2），T2I 预训练数据大小从零到 19.2 亿样本。对于深度，我们使用约 1700 万训练帧，包括真实和合成图像（表 1），并在 NYUv2 [29]、DIODE [35]、ETH3D [28] 和 ScanNet [9] 上评估深度。

items.en: The T2I trunk is a flat-token DiT [25] with parallel attention and MLP branches per block, pre- and post-RMSNorm, grouped-query attention, and RoPE positional encoding [31]. Latents are produced by a frozen FLUX.2 VAE [18] and tokenized by a fresh patch embedding; text prompts are encoded by a frozen UMT5-XXL [8] into embeddings, and the trunk attends to these text tokens at every block. We use logit-normal sampling for RGB, and plateau logit-normal sampling for depth, both with a timestep shift [10] of μ=1.1\mu=1.1. Additionally, we set pi2d=0.2p_{\text{i2d}}=0.2 and pd2i=0.2p_{\text{d2i}}=0.2, to focus the network on the case of a fully denoised image or depth map.
items.zh: T2I 主干是一个扁平词元 DiT [25]，每个块具有并行注意力和 MLP 分支、预和后 RMSNorm、分组查询注意力和 RoPE 位置编码 [31]。潜在表示由冻结的 FLUX.2 VAE [18] 生成，并由新的块嵌入进行词元化；文本提示由冻结的 UMT5-XXL [8] 编码为嵌入，主干在每个块中关注这些文本词元。我们对 RGB 使用 logit-normal 采样，对深度使用 plateau logit-normal 采样，两者都使用时间步偏移 [10] μ=1.1。此外，我们设置 pi2d=0.2 和 pd2i=0.2，以使网络专注于完全去噪的图像或深度图的情况。

items.en: Captioning follows protocols similar to those in SD3 [10] and WAN [36]. Each model in the family has the same number of layers but a different token size (Table 2).
items.zh: 标注流程遵循与 SD3 [10] 和 WAN [36] 类似的协议。该系列中的每个模型具有相同数量的层，但词元大小不同（表 2）。

items.en: The metrics are averaged across NYUv2 [29], DIODE [35], ETH3D [28] and ScanNet [9] datasets and take 256 ×\times 256 center crops. We use the robust affine-invariant alignment introduced in MoGe-2 [39].
items.zh: 指标在 NYUv2 [29]、DIODE [35]、ETH3D [28] 和 ScanNet [9] 数据集上取平均，并采用 256 × 256 中心裁剪。我们使用 MoGe-2 [39] 中引入的鲁棒仿射不变对齐方法。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Qualitative image-to-depth generation results. Modality Forcing generates robust and sharp depth maps yielding plausible 3D point clouds. We find JointDiT [6] sometimes fails catastrophically, missing structure or misestimating scale. PPD [42] produces much closer results, but Modality Forcing produces more robust results.
items.capZh: 图 5：图像到深度生成的定性结果。Modality Forcing 生成鲁棒且清晰的深度图，产生合理的 3D 点云。我们发现 JointDiT [6] 有时会灾难性地失败，丢失结构或错误估计尺度。PPD [42] 产生更接近的结果，但 Modality Forcing 产生更鲁棒的结果。

full.secZh: 4.2 基于 FLUX 的模态强制

items.capEn: Figure 6: Qualitative joint image-depth generation results. Modality Forcing samples RGB and geometry jointly, and proves to produce consistent and compelling point clouds. JointDiT [6] inherits compelling image generations from FLUX, but struggles with depth.
items.capZh: 图 6：联合图像-深度生成的定性结果。Modality Forcing 联合采样 RGB 和几何，并证明能生成一致且引人注目的点云。JointDiT [6] 继承了 FLUX 引人注目的图像生成能力，但在深度方面存在困难。

items.en: After showing Modality Forcing scales with T2I capability, we now evaluate its performance when paired with a SoA T2I model. We post-train FLUX.2-klein-9B with the Modality Forcing recipe and evaluate it on conditional and joint generation tasks. We post-train this model using the real-world and synthetic depth data shown in Table 1. The training recipe is largely unchanged from Section 4.1, only now we apply the self-distillation loss to retain more of the T2I prior (Section 3.3).
items.zh: 在展示了 Modality Forcing 随 T2I 能力扩展后，我们现在评估其与最先进 T2I 模型配对时的性能。我们使用 Modality Forcing 方案对 FLUX.2-klein-9B 进行后训练，并在条件生成和联合生成任务上评估它。我们使用表 1 中所示的真实世界和合成深度数据对该模型进行后训练。训练方案与第 4.1 节基本一致，只是现在我们应用自蒸馏损失以保留更多 T2I 先验（第 3.3 节）。

items.en: We evaluate the monocular depth estimation capability by evaluating affine-invariant depth on NYUv2 [29], DIODE [35], ETH3D [28], ScanNet [9] and KITTI [13]. We evaluate the Modality Forcing recipe against state-of-the-art depth estimation models. The comparison includes discriminative depth estimators, generative depth models, and existing joint image-depth generators. Discriminative depth estimators include the most performant models such as MoGe-2 [39] and Depth Pro [4]. We also include generative depth estimators such as pixel-perfect-depth (PPD) [42]. Finally, most comparable to Modality Forcing, we directly compare against methods which jointly generate image and depth such as JointDiT [6].
items.zh: 我们通过在 NYUv2 [29]、DIODE [35]、ETH3D [28]、ScanNet [9] 和 KITTI [13] 上评估仿射不变深度来评估单目深度估计能力。我们将 Modality Forcing 方案与最先进的深度估计模型进行比较。比较包括判别式深度估计器、生成式深度模型和现有的联合图像-深度生成器。判别式深度估计器包括性能最佳的模型，如 MoGe-2 [39] 和 Depth Pro [4]。我们还包括生成式深度估计器，如像素完美深度 (PPD) [42]。最后，与 Modality Forcing 最具可比性的是，我们直接与联合生成图像和深度的方法（如 JointDiT [6]）进行比较。

items.en: The results in Table 3 suggest that Modality Forcing convincingly outperforms existing joint image-depth models and generative depth models. We attribute the performance delta to the scalability of our recipe to real-world depth data, the strong prior from the FLUX.2-klein-9B backbone, and our post-training recipe. Modality Forcing is competitive even to the strongest depth models such as PPD [42], Depth Anything V2 [45] and MoGe-2 [39]. Modality Forcing outperforms all prior baselines on NYUv2 [29] and ETH3D [28]. Our performance on ScanNet [9] is also strong, but confounded by the ScanNet training split in our data mixture.
items.zh: 表 3 的结果表明，Modality Forcing 令人信服地优于现有的联合图像-深度模型和生成式深度模型。我们将性能差异归因于我们的方案对真实世界深度数据的可扩展性、来自 FLUX.2-klein-9B 骨干网络的强先验以及我们的后训练方案。Modality Forcing 甚至与最强的深度模型（如 PPD [42]、Depth Anything V2 [45] 和 MoGe-2 [39]）相比也具有竞争力。Modality Forcing 在 NYUv2 [29] 和 ETH3D [28] 上优于所有先前的基线。我们在 ScanNet [9] 上的性能也很强，但受到我们数据混合中 ScanNet 训练分割的混淆。

items.en: Qualitatively, Figure 5 shows that the predicted depth is consistent with ground truth. We find that JointDiT [6] infers predictions that violate geometric constraints such as straight lines and vertical walls. We also observe JointDiT’s quantization artifacts for distant predictions.
items.zh: 定性上，图 5 显示预测的深度与真实值一致。我们发现 JointDiT [6] 推断的预测违反了几何约束，如直线和垂直墙壁。我们还观察到 JointDiT 对远处预测的量化伪影。

items.en: Joint image-depth generation is a key capability enabling prompt-conditioned scene generation for artists, architects and embodied agents. Figure 6 shows a comparison between Modality Forcing and the existing SoA joint image-depth generator JointDiT [6]. JointDiT produces stunning images, but the depth predictions are not as robust as the Modality Forcing recipe.
items.zh: 联合图像-深度生成是一项关键能力，可为艺术家、建筑师和具身智能体实现提示条件场景生成。图 6 显示了 Modality Forcing 与现有最先进联合图像-深度生成器 JointDiT [6] 之间的比较。JointDiT 生成令人惊叹的图像，但深度预测不如 Modality Forcing 方案鲁棒。

items.en: Depth-to-Image Generation (D2I) Depth-to-image generation allows for generating various samples from a single depth map, conditioned on a text prompt. This unlocks generating various scenes with identical layout for embodied AI agents, or assets with identical geometry but different appearance. We follow the evaluation protocol from JointDiT [6] and UniCon [21] by evaluating on 6,000 images in the OpenImages dataset with Depth Anything V2 [45] depth annotations. We conduct two experiments: (1) generate all 6,000 images conditioned on DAv2 depth, and compute the FID vs GT images, (2) compute AbsRel between DAv2(generated images) and DAv2(GT images), this is a proxy for depth-following.
items.zh: 深度到图像生成 (D2I) 深度到图像生成允许从单个深度图生成各种样本，并受文本提示条件。这为具身 AI 智能体生成具有相同布局的各种场景，或生成具有相同几何但不同外观的资产。我们遵循 JointDiT [6] 和 UniCon [21] 的评估协议，在 OpenImages 数据集的 6000 张图像上使用 Depth Anything V2 [45] 深度标注进行评估。我们进行两个实验：(1) 以 DAv2 深度为条件生成所有 6000 张图像，并计算与 GT 图像的 FID；(2) 计算 DAv2（生成图像） 和 DAv2（GT 图像） 之间的 AbsRel，这是深度跟随的代理指标。

items.en: Unlike other T2I models, FLUX.2 uses double-stream layers (an image and text stream). We append a depth stream for those layers and freeze the RGB weights for the double stream layers. We train this model at 512 ×x\times\,x variable aspect ratio, where x≤512x\leq 512.
items.zh: 与其他 T2I 模型不同，FLUX.2 使用双流层（图像流和文本流）。我们为这些层附加一个深度流，并冻结双流层的 RGB 权重。我们在 512 × 可变宽高比（其中 x ≤ 512）下训练该模型。

items.en: We use logit-normal sampling for RGB, and plateau logit-normal sampling for depth, both with a timestep shift of μ=1.1\mu=1.1. Additionally, we set pi2d=0.2p_{\text{i2d}}=0.2 and pd2i=0.2p_{\text{d2i}}=0.2, to focus the network on the case of a fully denoised image or depth map.
items.zh: 我们对 RGB 使用 logit-normal 采样，对深度使用 plateau logit-normal 采样，两者均使用时间步偏移 μ=1.1。此外，我们设置 p_i2d=0.2 和 p_d2i=0.2，以将网络聚焦于完全去噪图像或深度图的情况。

items.en: We use the robust and optimal alignment solver (ROE) [39], as well as the ensemble approach documented by Marigold [15] with N=10N=10. We rerun the joint and generative models to match the protocols, we copy the discriminative results from the MoGe-2 paper as they match our protocol.
items.zh: 我们使用鲁棒最优对齐求解器 (ROE) [39]，以及 Marigold [15] 记录的集成方法，N=10。我们重新运行联合和生成模型以匹配协议，我们从 MoGe-2 论文复制判别式结果，因为它们与我们的协议匹配。

items.en: Modality Forcing allows setting arbitrary per-modality noise levels at inference time, a flexibility we previously showed enables competitive image-to-depth and depth-to-image generation. Here we leverage the same mechanism to extend our analysis to partial depth conditioning and to the model’s behavior across a range of different generation trajectories.
items.zh: Modality Forcing 允许在推理时设置任意每模态噪声水平，我们之前展示的这种灵活性使得竞争性的图像到深度和深度到图像生成成为可能。这里我们利用相同的机制将分析扩展到部分深度条件以及模型在一系列不同生成轨迹上的行为。

items.capEn: Figure 8: The denoising trajectory across depth and rgb dictates the strength of modality conditioning. Denoising more of depth early on means RGB will more rigidly match it. Here we show that this enables a new level of controllability of depth-conditioned image generation.
items.capZh: 图 8：深度和 RGB 上的去噪轨迹决定了模态条件的强度。早期对深度进行更多去噪意味着 RGB 将更严格地匹配它。这里我们展示了这实现了深度条件图像生成的新可控性水平。

items.en: In some creative applications, a user may want to control the conditioning strength between modalities — using a depth map to loosely fix coarse object pose, or to dictate precise geometry. Arbitrary denoising trajectories enable this partial conditioning: at every step we set 𝐱depth=(1−tdepth)​𝐱cond+tdepth​ϵ\mathbf{x}_{\text{depth}}=(1-t_{\text{depth}})\mathbf{x}_{\text{cond}}+t_{\text{depth}}\epsilon. Denoising depth earlier means more of RGB generation happens with clean depth, yielding stronger conditioning. Figure 8 shows that this mechanism effectively controls depth conditioning strength, and yields compelling and viable results. This simple test-time implementation adds another capability to the same model.
items.zh: 在某些创意应用中，用户可能希望控制模态之间的条件强度——使用深度图松散地固定粗略物体姿态，或规定精确几何。任意去噪轨迹实现了这种部分条件：在每一步我们设置 x_depth = (1 - t_depth) x_cond + t_depth ε。早期去噪深度意味着更多 RGB 生成发生在干净深度下，产生更强的条件。图 8 显示该机制有效控制深度条件强度，并产生令人信服且可行的结果。这种简单的测试时实现为同一模型增加了另一项能力。

items.en: We present Modality Forcing, a simple post-training recipe that turns a T2I model into a unified image-depth generator. The central idea is to assign each modality its own timestep and loss while sharing a single DiT backbone, which enables joint and conditional generation in any combination. Across controlled scaling experiments, the results suggest that stronger T2I pretraining transfers to stronger spatial prediction. Our strongest model based on FLUX.2-klein-9B achieves I2D performance competitive with the very best depth models. This supports the broader view that web-scale generative image models contain spatial structure that can be exposed and continues to scale.
items.zh: 我们提出了 Modality Forcing，一种简单的后训练方案，将 T2I 模型转变为统一的图像-深度生成器。核心思想是为每个模态分配自己的时间步和损失，同时共享单个 DiT 骨干网络，这实现了任意组合的联合和条件生成。在受控的 Scaling 实验中，结果表明更强的 T2I 预训练迁移到更强的空间预测。我们基于 FLUX.2-klein-9B 的最强模型实现了与最佳深度模型竞争性的 I2D 性能。这支持了更广泛的观点：网络规模的生成式图像模型包含空间结构，这些结构可以被揭示并持续扩展。

items.en: The current model also leaves clear directions for improvement in future work. First, our scaling study is limited to at most 3B parameters and does not derive a full scaling law. Future work may explore scaling to larger T2I models and study scaling behavior in greater detail. Second, our experiments use relatively few depth samples, several orders of magnitude fewer than what is seen during T2I pretraining. Following recent work [37], we will likely see another leap in performance by scaling up depth data and the T2I backbone to > 9B parameters. Finally, architectural adjustments may further reduce artifacts or enable prediction of metric depth. With these extensions, we believe Modality Forcing provides a broad foundation for scalable generation across modalities. Applied to depth, Modality Forcing competes with the very best specialist models and is shown to continue to scale.
items.zh: 当前模型也为未来工作留下了明确的改进方向。首先，我们的 Scaling 研究仅限于最多 3B 参数，并未推导出完整的缩放定律。未来工作可以探索扩展到更大的 T2I 模型，并更详细地研究 Scaling 行为。其次，我们的实验使用了相对较少的深度样本，比 T2I 预训练期间看到的样本少几个数量级。遵循最近的工作 [37]，通过将深度数据和 T2I 骨干网络扩展到 > 9B 参数，我们很可能会看到性能的又一次飞跃。最后，架构调整可能进一步减少伪影或实现度量深度预测。通过这些扩展，我们相信 Modality Forcing 为跨模态的可扩展生成提供了广泛基础。应用于深度时，Modality Forcing 与最佳专家模型竞争，并被证明持续扩展。

items.en: We thank Gengshan Yang, Katja Schwarz, Ben Mildenhall, Hao Zhang, Andy Cheng and other colleagues for productive discussions during the project and in revising the manuscript.
items.zh: 我们感谢 Gengshan Yang、Katja Schwarz、Ben Mildenhall、Hao Zhang、Andy Cheng 和其他同事在项目期间和修改手稿时的富有成效的讨论。
